method: Human-style walkthrough as the downstream consumer (M1 connector implementer): read the 314-line research doc from the top; checked that each decision an implementer must make (endpoint choice, auth mechanism, params, ambiguity handling, BBL direct lookup, fixture plan, human key steps) is answered with an official source URL + retrieval date or an explicit UNKNOWN.

scenario_results.note: Endpoints, auth (Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key), params incl. case-sensitivity, response semantics (null omission, return codes), cadence (quarterly PAD, 26B) all sourced and dated
Geoclient vs GeoSearch vs Geoservice vs GDE compared in an executive table with official status and recommendation (Geoclient v2 primary, GeoSearch fallback)
Rate limits, v1 deactivation date, intersection path inconsistency in the official guide itself all marked UNKNOWN - requires verification; no guessed values found

cross_gate_note: G1 PASS by data-contract-verifier recorded separately; verifier independently reproduced endpoints, auth, field examples, live keyless GeoSearch response matching the producer fixture. Verifier ran in a no-shell sandbox, so the orchestrator recorded the CLI gate entry on its behalf; the verdict and report are entirely the verifier's.
follow_ups: Fold verifier discrepancy notes 1-4 into a doc revision during M1-T003; capture portal-displayed v2 quotas and resolve intersection path with a live keyed call once B-004 clears.
